character.definition: (non-classical form of 雔) a kind of silkworm, pair of birds; couple; companion; to match, corresponding, proper
(same as 巽) the 5th of the Eight Diagrams 八卦, South-east, Mild, bland, insinuating, peaceful words
a kind of animal, cattle and horses to prance; to be lively
thick blood of cattle and goat
name of a district in Honan
